subcodes.first_line: Where art thou, O thou who journeyest through the land? Where art thou, O thou who maketh mention of My Name amongst the servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این انت یا ایها السائر فی البلاد این انت یا ایها الذاکر باسمی بین العباد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude
